name: WordPress v7
description: Initially started as a blogging tool in 2003, it has evolved into a highly flexible CMS that powers over 40% of the web. WordPress 7 requires MySQL 8.0 and is packaged as a new app alongside the legacy WordPress 6 entry.
longDescription: Initially started as a blogging tool in 2003, it has evolved into a highly flexible CMS that powers over 40% of the web. WordPress 7 requires MySQL 8.0 and is packaged as a new app alongside the legacy WordPress 6 entry.
